parameters.content:
## WF1: Lead Discovery
Searches JSearch for job openings matching targeting criteria.

**Env vars:** JSEARCH_API_KEY, OPENAI_API_KEY, GOOGLE_SHEETS_ID

parameters.jsCode: return $input.all().map(item => ({ json: { ...item.json } }));

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({model:'gpt-4o-mini',max_tokens:150,messages:[{role:'system',content:'Classify this company. Reply with ONLY a JSON object: {"classification":"direct_employer" or "staffing_firm" or "unclear", "company_size_tier":"small" or "mid_market" or "enterprise", "reason":"one sentence"}. Enterprise means publicly traded, Fortune 500, or revenue over $100M. Mid_market means roughly 100-1000 employees. Small means under 100 employees or startup. If the company is a recognizable household name (major tech, retail, finance, healthcare, consumer, or media brand), always classify it as enterprise. When truly uncertain about a lesser-known company, lean toward mid_market.'},{role:'user',content:'Company: '+$json.company_name+' | Job Title: '+$json.job_title+'. Is this a direct employer or staffing firm? What is the company size tier?'}]}) }}
